creator: mtk.manpages@gmail.com
text:
On http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=elf&apropos=0&sektion=5&manpath=FreeBSD+8.0-RELEASE&format=html

The elf(5) manual page has this tetx:

     .note	This section holds information in the ``Note Section'' format
		described below.  This section is of type SHT_NOTE.  No
		attribute types are used.


However, there is no ``Note Section'' below.

How-To-Repeat: doc problem
